mapper.select: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM eu.data_time)::INTEGER AS month, COALESCE(SUM(eu.value), 0) AS actual_value FROM energy_used eu WHERE eu.time_type = 'MONTH' AND eu.point_id IN ( SELECT np.point_id FROM node_point np WHERE np.node_id = #{nodeId} ) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM eu.data_time) = #{year} GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM eu.data_time) ORDER BY month ASC
